subtasks.title: Implement websocket channel contracts
subtasks.details: Define payload schema for each channel with event version, timestamp, correlation id, and data object.
questions: Do we need binary payloads for performance or JSON is acceptable?

subtasks.title: Secure websocket authentication and authorization
subtasks.details: Authenticate socket sessions and enforce role-based access for admin-only streams.
questions: Token in query param or subprotocol header?

subtasks.title: Implement frontend stream manager
subtasks.details: Create reusable client manager for subscribe/unsubscribe, reconnect, and state update dispatch.
acceptance_criteria: UI resumes updates after temporary disconnect.
No memory leaks after route changes.
questions: Should state be managed with Redux/Zustand or React context?

subtasks.title: Alerting and escalation integration
subtasks.details: Send critical events (trap alerts, execution failures, risk breach) to notification channels with retry and status tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Critical alert emitted to configured channels.
Alert status visible in audit logs.
